name: CYTTA CORP.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business Organization Cytta Corp. (Cytta or the Company) was incorporated on May 30, 2006, under the laws of the State of Nevada. It is located in Las Vegas, Nevada. Since 2014, Cytta has focused on developing and marketing advanced streaming and integrated communication products, using technology based upon the SUPR (Superior Utilization of Processing Resources) video compression codec/algorithm and our IGAN (Incident Global Area Network) incident command proprieta...
